news.summary: Houston-based company DYOPATH was recently listed on the prestigious 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list by The Channel Company. This annual list highlights the top IT service providers in North America based on revenue, showcasing the industry leaders. The combined revenue of the companies on the list totaled $548.9 billion, emphasizing their significant role in driving growth in the IT sector and global technology channel.
news.headline: DYOPATH makes 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list for largest NA tech companies with $548.9 billion revenue.

news.summary: InPlay Inc., a company based in Irvine, California, has revealed the launch of its latest NanoBeacon System-on-Chip (SoC), the IN120. This new SoC is tailored for high-volume smart label uses and is designed to bring about significant benefits in terms of simplicity, cost-effectiveness, and manufacturing efficiency. The innovative design of the IN120 stands out for its minimalist approach, needing just a single external component – a 26MHz crystal. This technological advancement aims to streamline processes and reduce costs for businesses utilizing smart label applications.
news.headline: InPlay announces release of 2nd-Gen NanoBeacon IN120 SoC for smart label makers, with only 1 external component.

news.summary: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has appointed eight new members to the CDC's Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP), replacing all 17 previous advisers. Kennedy cited the need to restore public trust in vaccine science and alleged conflicts of interest among the prior Biden-appointed members. The new committee, comprising the minimum required number of members under ACIP's charter, includes Martin Kulldorff, a biostatistician and epidemiologist critical of COVID-19 lockdowns and vaccine mandates. This move has sparked scrutiny, especially considering the controversy surrounding Kennedy's involvement in a Merck lawsuit ahead of a Senate hearing. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
news.headline: RFK Jr. appoints 8 new members to CDC's ACIP, dismissing all 17 existing advisers. Kennedy aims to boost public confidence in vaccine science after alleging conflicts of interest. Martin Kulldorff, COVID-19 critic, appointed to committee.

news.summary: Vultr, a cloud provider based in West Palm Beach, Florida, has recently revealed that they are one of the pioneering companies to provide access to the latest AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPU. It signifies a significant step forward in the industry, demonstrating Vultr's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological innovations.
news.headline: Vultr to offer AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPU for AI workloads, enhancing performance and efficiency in cloud computing.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, TensorWave, a prominent leader in AMD-powered AI infrastructure solutions, revealed the incorporation of AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPUs into their cutting-edge cloud platform. Pioneering as one of the initial cloud service providers to introduce the AMD Instinct MI355X, TensorWave empowers clients to access top-tier performance for highly rigorous AI tasks, along with unparalleled personalized setup assistance and support. The latest AMD Instinct MI355X GPU is structured on the 4th Gen AMD CD, marking a significant advancement.
news.headline: TensorWave deploys AMD Instinct MI355X GPUs in high-performance cloud platform, offering advanced AI workload acceleration for customers.

news.summary: In a recent development, the New York Mavericks have collaborated with NIC NAC Naturals, a tobacco-free nicotine provider. This partnership aims to offer alternative, cleaner nicotine options. This move comes as part of NIC NAC Naturals' strategy to diversify their product range. The collaboration signifies a proactive shift towards promoting healthier choices for consumers. The partnership announcement was made on June 12, 2025, signaling a significant step for both companies. This alliance is expected to increase the accessibility of tobacco-free nicotine products to a wider audience, aligning with the growing trend towards healthier lifestyle choices. The joint venture is poised to bring about positive changes in the industry and is anticipated to pave the way for future collaborations.
news.headline: NIC NAC Naturals partners with New York Mavericks for 2025 PBR Teams Season, offering clean nicotine options.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, a person shared their nostalgia for their grandmother's apricot jam recipe, which included the apricot pit at the bottom of the jar. Believing it to be a nut during childhood, they eventually created their own version of the jam in the early 1990s. After years of refining the recipe, they have devoted significant time and effort to perfecting it.
news.headline: Inventor from Pittsburgh creates unique apricot spread inspired by grandma's recipe; years of perfection.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Oracle is set to become one of the initial hyperscalers introducing an AI supercomputer featuring AMD's Instinct MI355X GPUs. Through Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), they plan to launch a cutting-edge zettascale AI cluster boasting a staggering capacity of 131,072 MI355X GPUs. This powerful setup will empower users to efficiently construct, train, and execute AI models on a large scale. The announcement was made jointly from Austin, Texas and Santa Clara, California on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Oracle and AMD collaborate to offer AI supercomputer with AMD Instinct MI355X GPUs, up to 131,072 units, to boost AI capabilities at scale.

news.headline: Primis Financial Corp. plans to sell part of its stake in Panacea Financial Holdings, Inc. Numbers not provided.

news.summary: Novartis AG (NYSE: NVS) recently shared findings from the Phase 3B APPULSE-PNH study which examined the effectiveness and safety of the oral medication Fabhalta (iptacopan) taken twice daily by adult patients with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH) having Hb levels of ≥10g/dL after switching from anti-C5 therapies (eculizumab or ravulizumab). The company disclosed the top-line results in December 2024. PNH is a rare blood disorder caused by complement-mediated processes. Individuals with PNH possess a mutation in their hematopoietic stem cells, leading to the production of red blood cells that are vulnerable to premature destruction. Additionally, Novartis' first-quarter earnings exceeded expectations, with the CEO expressing confidence in achieving the upgraded guidance. For further details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Novartis' Fabhalta shows success in treating patients with PNH, boosting hemoglobin levels ≥10g/dL, reducing fatigue.

news.summary: Alibaba.com and GS1 US® have joined forces to offer support to e-commerce sellers seeking to succeed online. They will be conducting a no-cost webinar on June 25, 2025, starting at 1PM ET. This webinar aims to provide valuable insights on utilizing the GS1 System effectively. This collaboration between the two organizations signifies a significant effort to assist online businesses.
news.headline: Alibaba.com and GS1 US collaborate to host free webinar on e-commerce for US companies, June 25, 2025 at 1PM ET.

news.summary: Simulations Plus Inc (NASDAQ: SLP) saw a decline in stock value as it revised down its fiscal 2025 sales expectations. The company anticipates third-quarter sales to range between $19 million-$20 million, significantly lower than the expected $22.78 million. Their updated 2025 sales projection is in the range of $76 million-$80 million, a decrease from the initial estimate of $90 million—$93 million. CEO Shawn O'Connor mentioned that uncertainties in the market concerning funding, drug pricing, and potential tariffs are posing challenges for pharmaceutical and biotech clients. These uncertainties have led to budget cuts, project cancellations, and delays more substantial than in recent years.
news.headline: Simulations Plus Inc (SLP) cuts sales outlook, expects Q3 sales of $19-$20M (consensus $22.78M), lowers 2025 forecast to $76-$80M (consensus $90.26M).CEO cites uncertainties affecting pharma/biotech clients.

news.summary: Seed's probiotic products, which have been clinically proven effective, can now be found in all 450 Sprouts locations throughout the US. The brand has seen an impressive 500% increase in revenue over the last three years. This growth has prompted Seed to further expand its distribution channels by entering the natural grocery sector, a vital avenue for increasing brand visibility and consumer awareness.
news.headline: Seed expands retail presence by launching at all 450 Sprouts stores across the US following 500% revenue growth in 36 months.
